_comment: Faithful 2026 SMG-supported MA plan extraction. See README.md. String fields are verbatim plan language; lib/data/fixtures/plans.ts derives engine numerics.

plans.name: Alignment Health Platinum + Instacart (HMO) 008
plans.acupuncture: $0 copay Medicare covered; routine via FLEX Allowance
plans.dental: Preventive copays ($10-$30); Comprehensive $20-$570; additional via FLEX
plans.flex: $500 every 6 months (up to $1,000/year) for Vision, Dental, Hearing, routine Acupuncture, Chiropractic, Podiatry

plans.name: Humana Gold Plus H5619-021 (HMO)
plans.acupuncture: $0 copay for acupuncture for chronic low back pain, up to 20 visits/year
plans.dental: Up to $3,000 allowance/year for non-Medicare preventive & comprehensive dental (DENF32); $0 Medicare-covered dental
plans.vision: $350/year ($450 at PLUS provider) for contacts or eyeglasses-lenses and frames; $0 routine exam 1/yr (VIS701)
plans.hearing: $0 routine exam 1/yr; $99 Advanced / $399 Premium hearing aid per ear/year (HER947, TruHearing)
plans.transportation: $0 copay, up to 24 one-way trips/year (max 50 miles/trip)

plans.inpatient: $295 copay per day for days 1-6; $0 per day days 7-90
plans.ambulance: Ground: $335 copay per date of service; Air: $1,250 copay
plans.mentalHealth: Outpatient therapy: $0 copay; Inpatient: $1,260 per admit
plans.acupuncture: $0 copay for acupuncture for chronic low back pain up to 20 visits/year
plans.dental: $0 preventive (cleanings 2/yr, exams); comprehensive incl. fillings; $1,500 max benefit/year
plans.vision: Medicare-covered $0; supplemental routine exam $0 (1/yr); $75 eyewear allowance ($150 at PLUS provider)/year
plans.hearing: Routine exam $0 (1/yr); $699 Advanced / $999 Premium hearing aid per ear/year (TruHearing)
plans.insulinCap: $35/month for a one-month (up to 30-day) supply of each Part B insulin product
